91-days.hook: Mafia drama: during American Prohibition, a man returns to his hometown to avenge his family, infiltrating the clan responsible. Dark, sober and adult, built on the theme of revenge and its costs. Short and well-crafted, with a convincing 1930s atmosphere.

akira.hook: Dystopian sci-fi: in a future Neo-Tokyo, a biker gang member gains uncontrollable psychic powers that threaten the city. A 1988 film that redefined animation, with visual quality still extraordinary today. Dark, dense and at times cryptic: an essential milestone.

akudama-drive.hook: Action sci-fi: in a divided Japan, an ordinary girl gets caught up with a gang of outlaw criminals on a dangerous mission. Vivid visual style, frantic pace and constant violence. It bets everything on energy and aesthetics rather than depth, but entertains relentlessly.

attack-on-titan.hook: Action dark fantasy: humanity survives locked behind towering walls, besieged by giants that devour people. It starts as survival horror and becomes a complex story about war, freedom and morality. One of the most important phenomena of 2010s animation, ever more ambitious.

berserk.hook: Medieval dark fantasy: a lone mercenary fights in a brutal world ruled by a cruel king and demonic forces. Dark and violent, it centers on the friendship and ambition that wear men down. A landmark manga adaptation, dated in animation but strong in writing and characters.

bleach.hook: Supernatural action shōnen: a student who sees ghosts inherits the powers of a soul reaper and ends up hunting corrupted spirits. Spectacular fights, memorable character design and a mythology that expands episode after episode. Very long: it asks for patience, but rewards you with high-impact moments.

code-geass.hook: Sci-fi with giant robots and political intrigue: an empire conquers Japan, and an exiled prince gains a power that lets him impose any command. He uses it to lead a rebellion. A strategic thriller full of twists, with a brilliant, ambiguous protagonist.

cowboy-bebop.hook: On-the-road sci-fi: a crew of bounty hunters roams the solar system amid dirty jobs and unresolved pasts. Near-standalone episodes, an atmosphere blending noir, western and jazz. A timeless classic, elegant and melancholic, with a legendary soundtrack.

cyberpunk-edgerunners.hook: Cyberpunk sci-fi: in a megalopolis obsessed with technology and body modification, a street kid becomes a mercenary to survive. Just ten intense, ultra-violent episodes, with Studio Trigger's explosive animation. Self-contained: enjoyable even without knowing the game it's based on.

dan-da-dan.hook: Action comedy between ghosts and aliens: two high schoolers, a medium and an occult nerd, get dragged into out-of-control paranormal clashes. Frantic pace, explosive Science SARU animation and a love story that grows amid the chaos. Funny, absurd and surprisingly sincere.

death-note.hook: Supernatural psychological thriller: a genius student finds a notebook that kills anyone whose name is written in it and decides to cleanse the world of criminals. It becomes a razor-tight battle of wits between him and an equally brilliant detective. Tense, cerebral and full of moral dilemmas. One of the most famous of all time.

demon-slayer.hook: Action dark fantasy in Taisho-era Japan: a boy becomes a demon slayer to avenge his family and turn his transformed sister human again. A simple, linear story, but with extraordinary ufotable animation and spectacular fights. A modern phenomenon, accessible to everyone.

devilman-crybaby.hook: Extreme horror drama: a gentle boy merges with a demon to fight the invasion, keeping a human soul. A bold retelling of a classic, with Masaaki Yuasa's experimental animation. Very violent, sexually explicit and tragic. Powerful, but for adults only.

flcl.hook: Surreal coming-of-age sci-fi: a boy's life explodes when an alien girl on a scooter bursts into his everyday world and upends all his certainties. Short, frantic and deliberately chaotic, it's a visionary metaphor for adolescence. Brilliant animation, but it demands openness to nonsense.

frieren.hook: Slow, melancholic fantasy: after the heroic adventure ends, a near-immortal elf sets out to understand the value of the time spent with her human companions. Gorgeous Madhouse animation, delicate writing. For those seeking emotion and reflection more than action.

fullmetal-alchemist-brotherhood.hook: Fantasy adventure: two alchemist brothers, scarred by a forbidden experiment, search for a way to get their lost bodies back. It blends action, a coherent world, wit and deep themes of sacrifice and responsibility. Considered one of the finest anime ever made: solid from start to finish, for everyone.

future-diary.hook: Survival thriller: twelve people receive diaries that predict the future and must eliminate one another to become the new god of time. A psychological battle royale, violent and melodramatic, marked by an obsessive co-lead. Gripping in concept, excessive in tone.

gangsta.hook: Adult crime drama: in a corrupt city, two handymen take the jobs no one else wants, caught between mafia, police and gangs. Noir atmosphere, wounded characters and concrete violence. Mature and compelling, though the anime remains unfinished due to production troubles.

gantz.hook: Extreme sci-fi horror: after dying, people are forced by a black sphere to hunt aliens in a deadly game. Brutal and disturbing, it explores human cowardice and selfishness. Very violent and raw, strictly for adults and not for everyone.

ghost-in-the-shell.hook: Philosophical cyberpunk sci-fi: in a future of cybernetic bodies, an elite agent hunts a hacker who can breach minds. More reflective than action, it probes identity and consciousness in the digital age. A foundational film of the genre, dense but hugely influential.

golden-kamuy.hook: Early-1900s Hokkaido: a war veteran nicknamed the Immortal and an Ainu girl search for hidden gold, chased by soldiers and criminals. A snowbound adventure mixing hunting, survival, Ainu culture and goofy humor that pops up where you least expect it. Original, red-blooded and, beneath the madness, surprisingly cultured.

grimgar-of-fantasy-and-ash.hook: Intimate survival fantasy: a group of kids wakes in an RPG-like world, forced to work as mercenaries with no memories or special powers. Instead of heroic epic, it tells of exhaustion, fear and the value of everyday life, with a beautifully crafted watercolor look.

gurren-lagann.hook: Mecha sci-fi: a timid boy living underground meets a reckless companion and sets out to reach the surface aboard combat robots. Overwhelming energy, over-the-top action and a constant crescendo. Beneath the spectacle, a sincere story about growth, hope and courage.

heavenly-delusion.hook: Post-apocalyptic sci-fi mystery: in a devastated Japan two kids cross monster-infested ruins, while elsewhere children live protected behind mysterious walls. Two parallel stories that slowly intertwine. Unsettling atmosphere and excellent direction from Production I.G; it asks for attention and patience.

hell-s-paradise-jigokuraku.hook: Historical-supernatural action: a ninja on death row can earn a pardon only by retrieving the elixir of eternal life on a mysterious island, alongside other criminals and their overseers. Late-Edo setting, a dark and very violent tone, with an island hiding eerie creatures and secrets.

hunter-x-hunter.hook: Shōnen adventure: a boy faces a grueling exam to become a Hunter and find his father. Beneath the boys' adventure surface lies surprisingly mature writing, with a clever power system and complex antagonists. This 1999 version is darker and more adult than the later remake.

jojo-s-bizarre-adventure.hook: Supernatural action: the descendants of the Joestar family fight using Stands, manifestations of their spiritual powers, on a journey to Egypt to stop an ancient enemy. Unmistakable style, battles based on strategy rather than strength. This is the classic OVA version, short and aimed at fans of the saga.

jujutsu-kaisen.hook: Modern supernatural action: a student swallows a powerful cursed object to save a friend and lands in a school of sorcerers who fight 'Curses', entities born from negative emotions. Battles spectacularly animated by MAPPA, a dark tone. One of the most-watched battle shōnen of recent years.

kingdom.hook: Historical war epic: in ancient China's Warring States period, a young servant aspires to become the greatest general, bonding with a throneless king. Military strategy, large-scale battles and the protagonist's growth. A long, ambitious series; the early visuals may put you off, but they improve markedly.

la-citta-incantata.hook: Fairy-tale fantasy: a ten-year-old girl is trapped in a world of spirits after her parents are turned into pigs, and must find the courage to save them. A Miyazaki and Studio Ghibli masterpiece, Oscar winner, imaginative and profound. Suitable for all ages yet never trivial.

made-in-abyss.hook: A deceptively charming fantasy adventure: a little girl descends into an immense abyss full of wonders and relics, accompanied by a mysterious robot, to find her explorer mother. The sweet aesthetic hides a cruel and often disturbing story. A fascinating world and gorgeous animation, but not for everyone.

mob-psycho-100.hook: Supernatural action with heart: a shy boy with enormous psychic powers just wants to grow as a person, keeping his emotions in check. Experimental, inventive animation, brilliant humor and a surprisingly mature message about self-worth. Behind the action is a genuine coming-of-age story.

monster.hook: Psychological thriller: a surgeon saves a boy's life and, years later, finds himself hunted over a string of murders linked to him. A tense chase across Germany, with one of the genre's most memorable villains. Slow, adult pacing and refined storytelling. A masterpiece of animated thriller.

my-hero-academia.hook: Superhero action: in a world where nearly everyone is born with a power, a boy with no ability still dreams of entering the most prestigious hero school. A classic but well-built battle shōnen, with a large cast and a strong sense of growth. One of the decade's most popular series.

naruto.hook: Ninja shōnen adventure: an outcast boy with a demon sealed inside him dreams of becoming his village's leader and earning acceptance. It blends action, friendship, growth and drama. One of the most popular series ever: very long and with filler stretches, but with memorable arcs.

neon-genesis-evangelion.hook: Psychological mecha sci-fi: teenagers pilot enormous bio-machines to defend Earth from mysterious creatures. Behind the action, a deep exploration of depression, identity and human relationships. A foundational, influential work, but demanding and at times disturbing: not your average entertainment mecha.

one-piece.hook: Pirate adventure: a rubber-bodied boy sets sail to become the Pirate King and find the legendary treasure One Piece. An immense, imaginative world, an unforgettable crew, and a rare balance of comedy, action and emotion. Huge and still ongoing: a commitment, but for many worth every episode.

one-punch-man.hook: Comedy action: a hero has become so powerful he defeats anyone with a single punch, and now suffers from profound boredom. A smart parody of the superhero genre, with spectacular animation and dry humor. The first season is famous for the technical quality of its battles.

parasyte-the-maxim.hook: Sci-fi horror: alien parasites invade human bodies, but one fails and lodges only in a student's right hand, forcing an uneasy coexistence. A raw reflection on humanity and survival, with tense action and disturbing moments. An original premise and a protagonist who changes profoundly.

principessa-mononoke.hook: Epic Studio Ghibli fantasy: a young cursed prince searches for a cure and finds himself caught in the conflict between an industrial town and the forest spirits. A grand fresco on the relationship between humanity and nature, with no clear heroes or villains. Magnificent animation and one of Miyazaki's most ambitious works.

samurai-champloo.hook: Edo-Japan adventure with a hip-hop aesthetic: a girl hires two opposite swordsmen to find a mysterious samurai. Episodic structure, direction by Watanabe (Cowboy Bebop), a rap soundtrack. An unmistakable style fusing historical period and modern culture. More atmosphere than continuous plot.

shangri-la-frontier.hook: Online-gaming adventure: a player who's an expert at mediocre titles takes on a legendary MMO full of challenges and monsters. Light, dynamic and fun fantasy action, built on a love of video games. Solid animation and a brisk pace, but aimed mainly at fans of the genre.

solo-leveling.hook: Modern fantasy action: in a world invaded by dungeons, the weakest hunter gains a mysterious system that makes him ever stronger. Adapted from a hugely successful Korean webtoon, it bets on spectacular animation and the protagonist's progression. More adrenaline-fueled entertainment than narrative depth.

steins-gate.hook: Time-travel sci-fi: in Akihabara, a group of friends accidentally discovers how to send messages into the past. It starts slow, almost a comedy, then becomes a tense, harrowing psychological thriller. Among the best anime ever made, but it asks for patience in the early episodes.

summer-time-rendering.hook: Supernatural thriller: a boy returns to his home island for a friend's funeral and discovers an eerie threat lies behind her death. A well-built mystery, tight pacing and a clever use of its time mechanics. It builds tension episode after episode.

the-promised-neverland.hook: Psychological thriller: three brilliant children discover the terrible truth hidden behind their idyllic orphanage and must plan an escape. The first season is tense and claustrophobic, an excellent mind game. A great start, but the sequel is considered far weaker: worth it mainly for the first part.

vinland-saga.hook: Viking historical drama: the son of a great warrior killed in battle, Thorfinn joins his father's killer's band to take revenge. A hard, mature tale of violence, revenge and the search for meaning. Excellent animation and powerful writing. Among the best recent historical dramas.
